hero.title:
AI-NATIVE
DIGI­TAL
SOLUTIONS
hero.body: Skyline DevHub is a development company engineering the digital future of Albanian business — AI-native and automation-first from the ground up. We deliver maximally efficient solutions through our own product suite and dedicated services.
hero.free: Get a free website — built by AI, delivered in minutes

about.title:
SOLUTIONS,
NOT SOFT­WARE
about.body1: Skyline DevHub exists to make the digitization of Albania intelligent from the start. While others retrofit AI onto legacy workflows, we build automation-first systems from the ground up — delivering efficiency that compounds.
about.body2: We are a development company, not a software vendor. We don't sell features or functionality — we engineer complete solutions through our own product suite and hands-on services, each designed for maximum operational efficiency.

approach.title:
PRODUCTS
& SERVICES
approach.body1: A complete development practice — proprietary products paired with dedicated services, each built AI-native and automation-first.
approach.body2: Each engagement is scoped to the outcome, not the feature list. We deliver what works — nothing more, nothing less.

work.title:
CASE
STUDIES
work.body: The best solutions disappear into the workflow. Here's what our partners have achieved through AI-native digital transformation.

cases.desc: AI trust infrastructure for identity verification, bias detection, and audit analytics. Serving 100+ organizations across financial services, healthcare, and e-commerce.
cases.challenge: Organizations deploying AI face hidden demographic biases, model security vulnerabilities, and opaque decision-making. Traditional security frameworks weren't built for this.
cases.solution: Built a comprehensive AI trust platform: real-time identity verification pipeline, multi-dimensional fairness scoring, continuous model monitoring, and enterprise-grade audit analytics with one-click compliance exports for SOC 2, ISO 27001, and GDPR.

cases.desc: Interactive SQL query platform for exploring Canadian charitable organization financial data from CRA T3010 tax forms. 83,000+ charities searchable with AI-powered natural language queries.
cases.challenge: Canadian charity financial data locked in rigid government formats with no accessible way for legal professionals, researchers, or auditors to query, filter, or aggregate across 83,000+ organizations and 150+ financial metrics.
cases.solution: Built a DuckDB-powered data explorer with dual query modes, dynamic filtering across nine normalized tables, Excel export, and an AI chat sidebar that translates natural language into SQL — letting non-technical users query charity financials conversationally.

cases.desc: Albanian real estate aggregator consolidating listings from 13 sources into a unified search platform. 12,500+ active listings across all major cities.
cases.challenge: Albania's real estate market is fragmented across dozens of independent listing sites with no unified search. Buyers and renters must check multiple platforms manually, with inconsistent data formats and no cross-source comparison.
cases.solution: Built an automated aggregation pipeline that normalizes listings from 13 sources into a single searchable platform with city-based navigation, transaction type filtering, and structured data for search engine visibility.

ocr-api.title:
DOCUMENT
INTELLIGENCE
ocr-api.body: Enterprise-grade OCR and document extraction API built for European compliance. Extract structured data from invoices, receipts, IDs, and government forms with AI-native accuracy.

compliance-api.title:
AUTOMATED
COMPLIANCE
compliance-api.body: Compliance automation for European fintech and regulated industries. KYC verification, AML screening, and audit trail generation.

ai-infrastructure.title:
AI-NATIVE
INFRASTRUCTURE
ai-infrastructure.body: Managed AI infrastructure for Balkan enterprises. From model deployment to workflow automation — purpose-built for regional compliance and data sovereignty.
